name: dashfi
description: Dash.fi brand & design system plugins for Claude Code and Claude Desktop.

plugins.name: dashbook
plugins.description: Dashbook — Dash.fi's brand & design system. Adds the dashbook-design-system skill, registers the hosted Dashbook MCP server (components, foundations, brand voice, logos, partner kits, marketing patterns), and ships nine slash commands across the product and marketing namespaces.
